description: Sue is the Interim Regional Director for the West Midlands, starting the role in July 2025. She previously served as Director of Teaching Workforce: Candidates, Trainees, Strategy, Portfolio and Analysis at the Department for Education (DfE) and Director, Professional and Technical Education, at the Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA). details.body:
Sue is the Interim Regional Director for the West Midlands, starting the role in July 2025.

She previously served as Director of Teaching Workforce: Candidates, Trainees, Strategy, Portfolio and Analysis at the Department for Education (DfE) and Director, Professional and Technical Education, at the Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA).

Sue joined the civil service in 2003 and has also held roles at the:

  • Department for Transport (DfT)
  • Department for Education
  • Ministry of Housing, Communities & Local Government (MHCLG)

Sue is the Interim Regional Director for the West Midlands, starting the role in July 2025.

She previously served as Director of Teaching Workforce: Candidates, Trainees, Strategy, Portfolio and Analysis at the Department for Education (DfE) and Director, Professional and Technical Education, at the Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA).

Sue joined the civil service in 2003 and has also held roles at the:

  • Department for Transport (DfT)
  • Department for Education
  • Ministry of Housing, Communities & Local Government (MHCLG)

The Interim Regional Director for the West Midlands is responsible for working locally across children’s social care, SEND, schools and area-based programmes to improve outcomes for children, families and learners. They are responsible for making decisions in the following local authorities:

  • Birmingham
  • Coventry
  • Dudley
  • Herefordshire, County of
  • Sandwell
  • Shropshire
  • Solihull
  • Staffordshire
  • Stoke-on-Trent
  • Telford and Wrekin
  • Walsall
  • Warwickshire
  • Wolverhampton
  • Worcestershire

More information about the responsibilities of regional directors is available.

Read about the West Midlands advisory board.

If you have any questions, email the regional director’s office rg.wm@education.gov.uk.

role.title: Interim Regional Director for West Midlands

role_appointments.title: Sue Lovelock - Interim Regional Director for West Midlands

details.body:
Sue is the Interim Regional Director for the West Midlands, starting the role in July 2025.

She previously served as Director of Teaching Workforce: Candidates, Trainees, Strategy, Portfolio and Analysis at the Department for Education (DfE) and Director, Professional and Technical Education, at the Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA).

Sue joined the civil service in 2003 and has also held roles at the:

  • Department for Transport (DfT)
  • Department for Education
  • Ministry of Housing, Communities & Local Government (MHCLG)
Leading the government’s reforms on technical education for young people and adults, including development and implementation of new T Levels.
